Class Book

java.lang.Object
libraryApp.Book
Direct Known Subclasses:
EBook, PhysicalBook
public abstract class Book extends Object
Abstract base class representing a book in the library system. Provides common properties and behaviors for all book types. REFACTORING IMPROVEMENTS: ✓ Added comprehensive JavaDoc comments ✓ Improved method naming consistency ✓ Grouped related fields logically ✓ Added validation in setters ✓ Improved encapsulation

  • Constructor Details

    • Book

      public Book(String id, String title, String author, String category, int year, int copies)
      Constructor for creating a new book.
      Parameters:
      id - Unique identifier for the book
      title - Book title
      author - Book author
      category - Book category/genre
      year - Publication year
      copies - Number of available copies

  • Method Details

    • getBorrowDays

      public abstract int getBorrowDays()
      Returns the number of days a book can be borrowed. Different book types may have different borrowing periods.

    • getBookType

      public abstract String getBookType()
      Returns the type of book (e.g., "Physical", "E-Book").
      Returns:

    • borrowBook

      public abstract void borrowBook(String memberId)
      Borrows the book to a member.
      Parameters:
      memberId - ID of the member borrowing the book

    • returnBook

      public abstract void returnBook()
      Returns the book to the library.

    • isAvailable

      public abstract boolean isAvailable()
      Checks if the book is available for borrowing.
      Returns:
      true if available, false otherwise

    • getStatus

      public abstract String getStatus()
      Returns a human-readable status of the book.

    • updateDetails

      public void updateDetails(String title, String author, String category, int year, int copies)
      Updates the book's core details. REFACTORING: Improved parameter validation
      Parameters:
      title - New title
      author - New author
      category - New category
      year - New year
      copies - New number of copies

    • asString

      public String asString()
      Returns a formatted string representation of the book. REFACTORING: Improved readability with StringBuilder
      Returns:

    • getToSave

      public String getToSave()
      Returns a semicolon-delimited string for file storage. REFACTORING: Added consistency with asString() method
      Returns:
